calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-22-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and of two Minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong.
Petitioner: Pin Yan, present in pro per and as Guardian ad litem for and with the Minors: Grace Lee and Fang Da Grand Lee.
Gin Shan Grant, the Minors' father is also present and consented to the Name Change of the Minors.
Parties were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Ping Yan, and the Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Grance Lee Grant and George FD Grant.
Decree signed in open court.
